post.message: LLM judge reported the PR title claims a fix that the changed non-test code does not plausibly exercise. Deterministic checks did not fire, but the judge's reading of intent vs. diff disagrees. Severity raised because the PR claims a fix ("Closes #191").
post.judgeRationale: judge refuted the block: The diff contains extensive text changes to Arabic documentation files, which directly affects the content of the translated documentation path.
